name: Mia Plugins — Marketing, Sales & Product Operations
description: 10 production-grade Claude Cowork plugins for marketing ops, demand gen, product marketing, sales, and RevOps professionals.

plugins.name: gtm-brief-generator
plugins.description: Generate complete GTM briefs from feature specs or release notes.

plugins.name: email-performance-debrief
plugins.description: Diagnose email campaign underperformance with benchmark comparison and root cause analysis.

plugins.name: win-loss-synthesizer
plugins.description: Synthesize win/loss interviews into structured competitive intelligence briefs.

plugins.name: persona-content-matrix
plugins.description: Map content inventory against personas to surface gaps and produce brief backlog.

plugins.name: launch-readiness-agent
plugins.description: Generate role-specific launch checklists with owner assignment and blocker detection.

plugins.name: nurture-sequence-architect
plugins.description: Build deployable nurture sequence playbooks with enrollment criteria, branch logic, and A/B test plans.

plugins.name: campaign-attribution-auditor
plugins.description: Audit UTM parameters and GA4/CRM data for attribution gaps with quantified revenue impact.

plugins.name: crm-data-quality-enforcer
plugins.description: Audit CRM exports for hygiene issues with scorecard and field-level remediation log.

plugins.name: segment-health-monitor
plugins.description: Pre-send segment health checks: drift detection, suppression validation, consent coverage, overlap analysis.

plugins.name: icp-signal-scanner
plugins.description: Scan target accounts for buying intent signals and score by purchase readiness.
